mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_execution_log (id, task_id, task_name, sync_mode, synced_rows, duration_ms, status, error_message, retry_count, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{syncMode}, #{syncedRows}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sync_execution_log SET synced_rows = #{syncedRows}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
